[User] You are the generator actor for a deterministic Pluto runtime phase.
Return exactly one fenced ```json block and nothing else.
The directive kind must be `change_task_state` and the payload must match exactly.
```json
{
  "kind": "change_task_state",
  "payload": {
    "taskId": "e0cedfea-2d67-47dc-a934-ec85d5c5c50d",
    "to": "running"
  }
}
```
```json
{
  "kind": "change_task_state",
  "payload": {
    "taskId": "e0cedfea-2d67-47dc-a934-ec85d5c5c50d",
    "to": "running"
  }
}
```
[User] You are the generator actor for a deterministic Pluto runtime phase.
Return exactly one fenced ```json block and nothing else.
The directive kind must be `change_task_state` and the payload must match exactly.
```json
{
  "kind": "change_task_state",
  "payload": {
    "taskId": "e0cedfea-2d67-47dc-a934-ec85d5c5c50d",
    "to": "running"
  }
}
```
```json
{
  "kind": "change_task_state",
  "payload": {
    "taskId": "e0cedfea-2d67-47dc-a934-ec85d5c5c50d",
    "to": "running"
  }
}
```
[User] You are the generator actor for a deterministic Pluto runtime phase.
Return exactly one fenced ```json block and nothing else.
The directive kind must be `publish_artifact` and the payload must match exactly.
```json
{
  "kind": "publish_artifact",
  "payload": {
    "kind": "final",
    "mediaType": "text/markdown",
    "byteSize": 256
  }
}
```
```json
{
  "kind": "publish_artifact",
  "payload": {
    "kind": "final",
    "mediaType": "text/markdown",
    "byteSize": 256
  }
}
```
[User] You are the generator actor for a deterministic Pluto runtime phase.
Return exactly one fenced ```json block and nothing else.
The directive kind must be `publish_artifact` and the payload must match exactly.
```json
{
  "kind": "publish_artifact",
  "payload": {
    "kind": "final",
    "mediaType": "text/markdown",
    "byteSize": 256
  }
}
```
```json
{
  "kind": "publish_artifact",
  "payload": {
    "kind": "final",
    "mediaType": "text/markdown",
    "byteSize": 256
  }
}
```
[User] You are the generator actor for a deterministic Pluto runtime phase.
Return exactly one fenced ```json block and nothing else.
The directive kind must be `change_task_state` and the payload must match exactly.
```json
{
  "kind": "change_task_state",
  "payload": {
    "taskId": "e0cedfea-2d67-47dc-a934-ec85d5c5c50d",
    "to": "completed"
  }
}
```
```json
{
  "kind": "change_task_state",
  "payload": {
    "taskId": "e0cedfea-2d67-47dc-a934-ec85d5c5c50d",
    "to": "completed"
  }
}
```
[User] You are the generator actor for a deterministic Pluto runtime phase.
Return exactly one fenced ```json block and nothing else.
The directive kind must be `change_task_state` and the payload must match exactly.
```json
{
  "kind": "change_task_state",
  "payload": {
    "taskId": "e0cedfea-2d67-47dc-a934-ec85d5c5c50d",
    "to": "completed"
  }
}
```
```json
{
  "kind": "change_task_state",
  "payload": {
    "taskId": "e0cedfea-2d67-47dc-a934-ec85d5c5c50d",
    "to": "completed"
  }
}
```
